title: Item List
description: Render a list of items from an array using the map() function.
problemStatement:
Transform arrays into UI! Given an array `const items = ["React", "Vue", "Angular"]`, create a component that returns a `<ul>` containing an `<li>` for each item.

**Requirement:** Use the `.map()` method inside the JSX.
hints: In React, we use JavaScript's `map()` to iterate and return JSX elements.
